channel.title: Publications on Koji KIMOTO: Profile page
channel.description: Recent content in Publications on Koji KIMOTO: Profile page

item.title: Pulications
item.description:
• Selected papers
    • 4D-STEM and machine learning
    • High SN-ratio and quantitaitve STEM imaging
    • High spatial-resolution STEM-EELS
    • High energy-resolution TEM-EELS
    • High spatial-resolution TEM
    • Convergent-beam electron diffraction
  • Reviews
  • Books

Selected papers

4D-STEM and machine learning

  • Spatially resolved diffractometry with atomic-column resolution
    Koji Kimoto, Kazuo Ishizuka
    Ultramicroscopy, 111 (2011) 1111-1116.
  • Non-negative matrix factorization for mining big data obtained using four-dimensional scanning transmission electron microscopy
    F. Uesugi, S. Koshiya, J. Kikkawa, T. Nagai, K. Mitsuishi, K. Kimoto
    Ultramicroscopy 221 (2021) 113168.
  • Unsupervised machine learning combined with 4D scanning transmission electron microscopy for bimodal nanostructural analysis
    Koji Kimoto, Jun Kikkawa, Koji Harano, Ovidiu Cretu, Yuki Shibazaki, Fumihiko Uesugi
    Scientific Reports 14 (2024) 2901.
  • Unveiling Twist Domains in Monolayer MoS2 through 4D-STEM and Unsupervised Machine Learning
    Koji Kimoto, Ovidiu Cretu, Koji Harano, Fumihiko Uesugi, Jun Kikkawa, Kohei Aso, Yoshifumi Oshima, Takashi Matsumoto, Yoshiki Sakuma
    Small Methods 9 (2025) e01065.
  • Nonnegative matrix factorization incorporating domain specific constraints for four dimensional scanning transmission electron microscopy
    Koji Kimoto, Fumihiko Uesugi, Koji Harano, Jun Kikkawa, Ovidiu Cretu, Yuki Shibazaki, Motoki Shiga, Atsushi Togo
    Scientific Reports 15 (2025) 39143.

High SN-ratio and quantitaitve STEM imaging

  • Direct observation of single dopant atom in light-emitting phosphor of β-SiAlON : Eu2+
    Koji Kimoto, Rong-Jun Xie, Yoshio Matsui, Kazuo Ishizuka and Naoto Hirosaki
    Appl. Phys. Lett., 94 (2009) 041908.
  • Local crystal structure analysis with several picometer precision using scanning transmission electron microscopy
    Koji Kimoto, Toru Asaka, Xiuzhen Yu, Takuro Nagai, Yoshio Matsui and Kazuo Ishizuka
    Ultramicroscopy, 110 (2010) 778-782.
  • Quantitative annular dark-field imaging of single-layer graphene—II: atomic-resolution image contrast
    Shunsuke Yamashita, Shogo Koshiya, Takuro Nagai, Jun Kikkawa, Kazuo Ishizuka and Koji Kimoto
    Microscopy, 64 (2015) 409-418.
  • Atomic number dependence of Z contrast in scanning transmission electron microscopy
    Shunsuke Yamashita, Jun Kikkawa, Keiichi Yanagisawa, Takuro Nagai, Kazuo Ishizuka & Koji Kimoto
    Sci. Rep., 8 (2018) 12325.

High spatial-resolution STEM-EELS

  • Element-selective imaging of atomic columns in a crystal using STEM and EELS
    Koji Kimoto, Toru Asaka, Takuro Nagai, Mitsuhiro Saito, Yoshio Matsui & Kazuo Ishizuka
    Nature, 450 (2007) 702-704.
  • Decisive factors for realizing atomic-column resolution using STEM and EELS
    Koji Kimoto, Kazuo Ishizuka, Yoshio Matsui
    Micron, 39 (2008) 653-657.

High energy-resolution TEM-EELS

  • Software techniques for EELS to realize about 0.3 eV energy resolution using 300 kV FEG-TEM
    K. Kimoto, Y. Matsui
    J. Microsc., 208 (2002) 224.
  • 0.23 eV Energy Resolution Obtained Using a Cold Field-emission Gun and a Streak Imaging Technique
    K. Kimoto, K. Ishizuka, T. Asaka, T. Nagai and Y. Matsui
    Micron, 36 (2005) 465-469. -
  • Advantages of a Monochromator for Bandgap Measurements Using Electron Energy-Loss Spectroscopy
    K. Kimoto, G. Kothleitner, W. Grogger, Y. Matsui and F. Hofer
    Micron, 36 (2005) 185-189.

High spatial-resolution TEM

  • Observations of Gold Atomic Clusters in Magnesium Oxide Films under Off-Bragg Conditions
    Koji KIMOTO, Nobuo TANAKA , Kazuhiro MIHAMA
    Journal of Electron Microscopy, 38 (1989)165–171.
  • Practical Procedure for Coma-Free Alignment Using Caustic Figure
    K. Kimoto, K. Ishizuka, N. Tanaka and Y. Matsui
    Ultramicroscopy, 96 (2003) 219-227.
  • Assessment of lower-voltage TEM performance using 3D Fourier transform of through-focus series
    Koji Kimoto, Keiji Kurashima, Takuro Nagai, Megumi Ohwada, Kazuo Ishizuka
    Ultramicroscopy, 121 (2012) 31–37.
  • Quantitative evaluation of temporal partial coherence using 3D Fourier transforms of through-focus TEM images
    Koji Kimoto, Hidetaka Sawada, Takeo Sasaki, Yuta Sato, Takuro Nagai, Megumi Ohwada, Kazu Suenaga and Kazuo Ishizuka
    Ultramicroscopy, 134 (2013) 86-93.

Convergent-beam electron diffraction

  • Measurement of Strain in Locally Oxidized Silicon using Convergent-Beam Electron Diffraction
    Koji Kimoto, Katsuhisa Usami, Hiroshi Sakata and Michiyoshi Tanaka
    Jpn. J. Appl. Phys. 32 (1993) L211.

Reviews

  • Scanning Transmission Electron Microscopy
    Koji KIMOTO
    Compendium of Surface and Interface Analysis (2018) 587-592.
  • Practical aspects of monochromators developed for transmission electron microscopy
    Koji Kimoto
    Microscopy, 63 (2014) 337-344.

Books

  • Scanning Transmission Electron Microscopy Of Nanomaterials: Basics Of Imaging And Analysis
    Nobuo Tanaka ed.
    Imperial College Press (2014), ISBN 978-1848167896
    Chapter STEM-EELS
  • 物質・材料研究のための透過電子顕微鏡
    木本浩司、三石和貴、三留正則、原徹、長井拓郎
    講談社(2020) ISBN　978-4-06-520386-6
    1.概論 2.ハードウエア 6.STEM 8.EELS を担当
  • 透過電子顕微鏡 第2版 (表面分析技術選書)
    日本表面真空学会編、田中信夫、幾原雄一、木本浩司、津田健治、森下茂幸、渡辺万三志
    丸善出版(2026) ISBN 978-4621312773
    STEMの章を担当
